sku_id: CasaBella 24 Gallon Extra Large Heavy Duty Foldable Moving Bags With Carrying Handles

segments.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style ad video.
Timeline:
0-3s: Show a person in a bedroom vigorously stuffing clothes into an overfilled plastic garbage bag. Use a slow-motion close-up of the plastic handle stretching thinner and thinner until it snaps, clothes tumbling onto the floor.
3-6s: Quickly introduce the product as the direct solution. The bright blue CasaBella moving bag slides into frame, its wide wraparound handles gripped easily. Clothes are loaded smoothly through the full-zip top opening. The scene becomes clean and organized.
6-10s: Fast-cut scene 1 showing the first clear result. The bag is fully loaded, zipped shut, and carried effortlessly by the sturdy blue handles down a hallway.
